steps.title: Set up the cost expression for each item
steps.content: Since napkins cost \$0.06 each and we're buying x napkins, the napkin cost is \$0.06x. Since serving trays cost \$0.72 each and we're buying y serving trays, the tray cost is \$0.72y.

steps.title: Combine the costs and set equal to the total
steps.content:
The total cost is the sum of both expenses:
$$0.06x + 0.72y = 583.20$$
That is the correct answer.
